title: tephroseris karjaginii
intro: Tephroseris karjaginii, also known as the alpine marigold, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Tephroseris karjaginii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and act as a natural remedy for skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Tephroseris karjaginii can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues and skin problems.
